---
title: "Papers, May 2026"
bibliography: refs.bib
---

## [A Dual-Channel ASR-LLM Architecture with a Progressive Training Strategy for Low-Resource Speech Recognition](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11462861) [@ma2026dualchannel]

## [OCR-Enhanced Multimodal ASR Can Read While Listening](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11463873) [@chen2026ocrasr]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18393)

## [F5E-TTS: Enhancing Speech Synthesis by Aligning Text with Rich Semantic Representations](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11462167) [@chen2026f5etts]
- [code](https://github.com/kaleo996/F5E-TTS)

## [Leveraging Large Language Models for Text Normalization of Non-Standard Words in Text-to-Speech Synthesis](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11463552) [@ma2026llmtn]
- Prompting + LoRA

## [Align2speak: Improving TTS for Low Resource Languages via ASR-Guided Online Preference Optimization](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11460913) [@hussain2026align2speak]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.21718)
- uses Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to adapt an autoregressive, multilingual TTS model to new languages

## [Super Monotonic Alignment Search](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11464903) [@lee2026smas]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.07704)
- [code](https://github.com/supertone-inc/super-monotonic-align) --- MIT
- GPU accelerated MAS; 19x to 72x faster

## [Length-Aware Rotary Position Embedding for Text-Speech Alignment](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11461230) [@kim2026lengthaware]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.11084)

## [UniDiff-TTS: Aligner-Free Diffusion Speech Synthesis with Duration Guidance](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11461388) [@chen2026unidifftts]

## [CC-G2PNP: Streaming Grapheme-to-Phoneme and Prosody with Conformer-CTC for Unsegmented Languages](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11463299) [@shirahata2026ccg2pnp]
- [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.17157)

::: {#refs}
:::
